name: Naturally Splendid Enterpr.LtdR
summary: Naturally Splendid Enterprises Ltd. is a biotechnology and consumer products company focused on developing, producing, commercializing, and licensing high-demand products and technologies. The company's brands include Natera Hemp Foods, Prosnack Natural Foods, Chii Naturally Pure Hydration, Elevate Me, and Woods Wild Bar. It is headquartered in Pitt Meadows, British Columbia, Canada.
